assertions.assertion: Explains that AddUserManagement() automatically registers IProfileService
assertions.rationale: AddUserManagement auto-registering IProfileService is Duende-specific product behavior.

assertions.assertion: Mentions that claims mapping is based on requested scopes (openid -> sub, email -> email)
assertions.rationale: The specific claims mapping behavior of Duende User Management is product-specific.

assertions.assertion: Notes that custom user attributes can be exposed via custom identity resources
assertions.rationale: Custom attributes via identity resources is a Duende User Management design detail.

assertions.assertion: Sets LoginUrl and LogoutUrl in IdentityServer options to point to account pages
assertions.rationale: The specific /Account/Login and /Account/Logout paths for User Management are product-specific.
